steps.title: Find the key signal in the passage
steps.content: The passage describes Stevens's poetry as dense and experimental, and adds that many readers have a difficult time even identifying the poems' subjects. The blank must name the precise challenge readers face with this poetry.

steps.title: Eliminate wrong choices, confirm the match
steps.content:
• "comprehend": means to understand — readers struggle to grasp meaning, which matches the description of density, experimentation, and obscure references. ✓
  • "dislike": addresses preference, but the passage says nothing about whether readers enjoy the poetry. ✗
  • "interrupt": means to break into or stop, which has no logical connection to the difficulty readers have with the poems' content. ✗
  • "overlook": means to fail to notice, which is the opposite of the challenge — readers do notice the poetry but cannot understand it. ✗
That matches the correct answer — A is correct.
